messages.text: listen you bent that fridge universe shifted a little
those bottles saw you and immediately accepted defeat
they still colder than your rizz tho 👀
wild talk from someone interrogating arizona cans
i was choosing my emotional support juice actually
you love the sound of you
nah mine is confidence with a splash of concern
concern for what, the milk crying behind me
milk retired the second you clocked in, lactose humbled
not you giving dairy a character arc
wait i actually screenshotted this already
same, me and the door fighting for our lives
